Please check again. 
Dependecies of imake is already there. (USE_IMAKE=yes in the Makefile) 

$ make build-depends-list 
/usr/ports/devel/imake 
/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/libXmu 
/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/libXt 
/usr/ports/x11/libICE 
/usr/ports/x11/libSM 
/usr/ports/x11/libX11 
/usr/ports/x11/libXext 
/usr/ports/x11/libXpm
